name: Block Blast！
core_loop: Drag polyomino blocks onto an 8x8 grid to complete full rows or columns, clearing them to score points and free up space.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers aged 25-55 seeking a relaxing, low-pressure mental challenge during short breaks.
visual_style: Clean, vibrant abstract aesthetic featuring glossy, beveled blocks on a high-contrast dark grid.

palette.description: A soothing royal blue background paired with a dark navy game board and bright, saturated block colors.
